# Tickets — Index

**Generated by:** Phase 3 ticket-generator agent (see `agents-playbook/sub-agents.md`)
**Source of truth:** `docs/TASKS.md`
**Last regenerated:** not yet — scaffold only

## Format

Every `todo` / `in-progress` row in `docs/TASKS.md` is mirrored as a self-contained ticket file at `docs/knowledge/tickets/T-XXXX.md`. That file is the complete agent context — an agent handed only that file should be able to execute the task.

## How `/whats-next` reads this file

When Amit says "I have 45 minutes," the `/whats-next` command:

1. Reads this `_INDEX.md`.
2. Filters to tickets whose `estimated_time` ≤ the budget.
3. Within the remaining set, picks the largest parallelizable group whose `files_touched` are pairwise disjoint.
4. Within that group, picks 3 that have no unmet dependencies.
5. Proposes those 3 to Amit; on confirmation, spins them up as parallel cloud agents in isolated git worktrees.

## Grouping views (filled by the generator)

### By time budget

- **30 min:** (none yet)
- **45 min:** (none yet)
- **60 min:** (none yet)
- **90 min:** (none yet)

### By parallelizability (disjoint file sets)

Groups of tickets whose `files_touched` do not overlap — safe to run as parallel agents.

- Group A — (empty)
- Group B — (empty)

### By dependency chain

Tickets ordered by what must land first.

- Root (no deps): (empty)
- Tier 1 (depends only on root): (empty)

- `cluster:schema` — (empty)

- `cluster:ui-shell` — (empty)
- `cluster:mobile` — (empty)

## Ticket file schema (what each `T-XXXX.md` contains)

```
# T-0042 — Brain dump extractor v1

**Owner:** cursor-cloud-1
**Estimate:** 90 min
**Complexity:** medium
**Cluster:** cluster:ai-router
**Status:** todo
**Dependencies:** T-0038 (met), T-0041 (met)

## Context

(Short — what this task is, why it exists, what "done" looks like.)

## Applicable HARD_RULES

- §6.1 AI routing via OpenRouter only, no direct provider SDK
- §6.2 Accept-reject flow on every AI mutation
- §6.4 RAM-only scanner rule

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] (concrete, testable)
- [ ] ...

## Files to touch

- `convex/actions/brainDumpExtractor.ts` (new)
- `convex/proposals.ts` (extend)
- `apps/web/app/(brain-dump)/page.tsx` (new)
- `packages/ai/src/route-by-task.ts` (extend)

## Implementation guidance

(Enough context that the agent does not have to hunt.)

## Done checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` clean
- [ ] `pnpm test` clean
- [ ] `pnpm scan:forbidden-tech` clean
- [ ] Accept-reject preview renders in UI
- [ ] PR description references T-0042 and copies acceptance criteria
```
